name: medical clinics processing 20–50 claims/month tool
description: For medical clinics processing 20–50 claims/month, inaccurate patient eligibility tracking causes claim denials. We automate eligibility tracking and claim filing instead of manual tracking and filing of claims.
problem_solved: Inaccurate patient eligibility tracking leads to claim denials.
